channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large branch broken of willow tree, 22nd July
item.description:
The tree people attended Brenchley Close at approximately 7.30pm they cleared up most of the overhanging tree, although have left huge tree trunks and foliage which is very unsightly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brenchley Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd July
item.description:
Bins x2, full of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not empty!!, 22nd July
item.description:
Where is our council tax going?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This broken tree is going to cause a serious accident if it falls on someone., 22nd July
item.description:
The tree is damaged and will cause a serious accident if it snaps right off and lands on someone. The owners are not doing anything.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairfield Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on the street- scattered across the pavement, 22nd July
item.description:
Put more bins out!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Wren Road SE5. Loose guard around tree, possible superfluous along with stake and ties etc, 22nd July
item.description:
Please investigate/remedy.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wren Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed illegal, 22nd July
item.description:
This vehicle reg DT65 FZW untaxed flat tyres abandoned in needed parking space outside 208 Parkside Avenue get it moved no tax get it moved why do we pay for this incompetent council get it moved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 207, Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Please clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Refuse bins in road, 22nd July
item.description:
People at number 6 Cornwallis Avenue N9. Regularly placing there refuse and recycling bins in road to save parking spaces. Road is already hard enough to park in without selfish people claiming parking by doing this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cornwallis Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Barriers, equipment or materials left on the highway

item.title: Dyne & Dunster pass through, 22nd July
item.description:
A large sofa and an armchair have been dumped on the pavement beside the communal bins. The items are obstructing the area around the bins and appear to have been fly-tipped. The waste has been present since today. Please arrange for it to be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Opposite 35 edward road, 22nd July
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Road Industrial Estate, New Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
